title: Calling a declared subagent without a SubagentDriver wired in emits subagent_failed (not silent skip)
description: When Commission.subagents is non-empty but the agent has no SubagentDriver configured (the prototype default), a parent invocation MUST surface as subagent_invoked → subagent_failed. The model receives an `Error: ...` tool_result so it can react; the wire shape stays well-formed. Pinning this avoids the failure mode where a misconfigured agent silently swallows subagent calls.

subagents.name: helper
subagents.description: Won't actually be reachable in this case.

events.label: subagent_invoked is still emitted — the parent did call the subagent
subagent_failed names the missing-driver failure with a stable error code

forbidden_events.label: no subagent_returned when the subagent failed
